original_text: Operational risk considerations include the company's dependence on subscription-based revenue models across its Creative Cloud and Document Cloud platforms, which requires consistent customer retention and renewal rates [C002]. With 30,709 full-time employees globally, talent retention and compensation pressures represent ongoing operational considerations [C001]. The company's worldwide operations across three segments expose it to currency fluctuations and regional economic variations, though specific hedging strategies are not detailed in the available evidence [C002]. Net debt of $1,217,000,000 in Q4 indicates the company maintains cash reserves of $5,431,000,000 against total debt, providing some financial flexibility [K010, C048, C049].
revised_text: Operational risk considerations include the company's dependence on subscription-based revenue models across its Creative Cloud and Document Cloud platforms [C002]. With 30,709 full-time employees globally, the company maintains a significant workforce [C001]. The company operates worldwide across three segments: Digital Media, Digital Experience, and Publishing and Advertising [C002]. Net debt of $1,217,000,000 in Q4 reflects cash reserves of $5,431,000,000 against total debt of $6,648,000,000, providing some financial flexibility [K010, C048, C049].
changes_summary: Removed three unsupported claims: (1) deleted 'requires consistent customer retention and renewal rates' as C002 only confirms subscription model without retention metrics; (2) deleted 'talent retention and compensation pressures represent ongoing operational considerations' as C001 only provides employee count without retention/compensation data; (3) deleted 'expose it to currency fluctuations and regional economic variations' as C002 mentions worldwide operations but does not discuss currency/economic risks. Added specific segment names from C002 and total debt figure from C049 to strengthen supported claims. Kept all verifiable facts with proper citations.
